mod.paladin_spells.name: Paladin Spells
mod.paladin_spells.description: A collection of holy offensive and defensive spells for paladins.
spell.paladin_spells.taunt.description: Doth compel all foes within thy reach to assail thee.
spell.paladin_spells.bulwark.description: Calls upon celestial light to reinforce thy armour, shielding thee from harm through the blessing of the heavens.
